query: SELECT id, title, category, region, source, is_research_of_day, date_label FROM research_reports WHERE date_label = CURDATE() ORDER BY is_research_of_day DESC, id DESC LIMIT 15;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aGZ9MSLrhgSbtV.0a4dfe1f8b2a --database UyPaon6i3Ec4nvfPz6kUfg --execute SELECT id, title, category, region, source, is_research_of_day, date_label FROM research_reports WHERE date_label = CURDATE() ORDER BY is_research_of_day DESC, id DESC LIMIT 15;
